description_long: This bungalow features a modern, rectilinear design with a flat roof and a combination of white and green exterior surfaces. The front facade includes a large garage door, a recessed entryway, and a set of stone steps leading up to the entrance, flanked by decorative rocks. The structure is composed of several interlocking box-like volumes, with some sections clad in green and others in white, creating a visually dynamic appearance. The use of large, flat surfaces and minimal ornamentation gives the building a contemporary feel. There is a visible porch area at the front, partially sheltered by an overhanging roof and supported by slender columns. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, contributing to the modern aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white and green facades, a prominent garage, and a recessed entry with stone steps and decorative rocks. The design features interlocking boxy volumes and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered, boxy structure and the white and green exterior surfaces, with the stone steps and rocks visible at the right edge.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the garage door, recessed entryway, stone steps, decorative rocks, and the porch area under the overhang.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the elongated form, flat roof, and the arrangement of windows and green cladding, with the entry steps and rocks at the left.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the simple, blocky white volumes with minimal window openings and no visible entry points.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
